trivia_bullets.text: Furnace Hellkite is a 5/5 artifact creature Dragon with Affinity for artifacts — its base cost of 5RR reduces by 1 for each artifact controlled. In artifact-heavy Modern and Commander shells this can make it effectively a 2-3 mana 5/5 flyer. The combination of Affinity and a {R} pump ability ties it directly to the Affinity archetype lineage that began in Mirrodin (2003). EDHREC rank 9224 — the best-adopted of the five MH3 cards in this wave. [Scryfall]

Flavor text: "Some mornings it wakes up determined to consume the red sun itself." [Scryfall]. The line positions the creature as a force of appetite without limit — an ambition framing consistent with the Hellkite subtype's design tradition of red dragon excess.

As an Artifact Creature — Dragon, Furnace Hellkite bridges two MH3 mechanical threads: the set's energy and artifact themes, and the classic Affinity mechanic (first printed in Mirrodin, banned in Extended/Legacy-adjacent formats due to Arcbound Ravager-era abuse). Printing Affinity on a standalone Dragon at uncommon keeps it castable without being the axis of a broken combo. Art by Fang Xinyu. [Scryfall]
